compilerOptions._deleteOutDir_note: Kept false in dev so the worker container's `node --watch dist/worker.js` doesn't lose its entry mid-flight every time the api container restarts.
compilerOptions._swagger_plugin_note: The @nestjs/swagger plugin auto-derives OpenAPI types from TS reflection — without it, fields like `name: string | null` ship as `nullable: true` with no `type`, which openapi-typescript v7 mangles to `Record<string, never> | null`. classValidatorShim picks up `@IsString`/`@Min`/etc as schema constraints. introspectComments turns JSDoc on the property into the OpenAPI description.
